nasb.text: It will come about in that day,” declares the Lord God, “That I will make the sun go down at noon And make the earth dark in broad daylight.

esv.text: “And on that day,” declares the Lord God, “I will make the sun go down at noon and darken the earth in broad daylight.

cnv.text: “到那日，這是耶和華的宣告： 我必使太陽在正午落下， 在白晝使地變成昏暗。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说： “到那日，我要使太阳中午落下， 使白昼变为黑暗。
